experiences.title: Co-founder & CCO
experiences.description:
As Co-founder of Hypermedia Out of Home Specialists, I created the first in-store media company in the United Arab Emirates 12 years ago and managed to grow it to one of the largest out-of-home companies in the GCC in less than a decade.

HyperMedia is the Out-Of-Home specialist subsidiary of one of the leading media groups in the Middle East, W Group. HyperMedia is one of the world’s leading DOOH advertising companies, with a portfolio that includes many of the highest profile retail projects, Malls, Dubai Metro and Outdoor. HyperMedia delivers an unrivaled variety of advertising solutions across the Middle East.

accomplishment_projects.title: Hypermedia
accomplishment_projects.description: HyperMedia is the Out-Of-Home specialist subsidiary of one of the leading media groups in the Middle East, Rotana Media Services (RMS).  HyperMedia is a “destination” out-of-home media company, as we target people when they arrive at their destination rather than when they are on the move. HyperMedia is one of the world’s leading retail-focused OOH advertising companies, with a portfolio that includes many of the world’s high profile retail projects. HyperMedia delivers an unrivaled variety of advertising media across the Middle East including: •  Dominating all in-store advertising, with a portfolio of over 200 hypermarkets in the United Arab Emirates (UAE), Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Qatar, Oman, Syria and Jordan •  Managing more than 800 lampposts in Dubai Media City, Internet City, Knowledge Village and around most Community Centers in the UAE. •  Managing all promotional and advertising activities at Hajj Terminal, part of King Abdul Aziz International Airport, the largest airport terminal in Saudi Arabia •  Long term advertising partner of Abraj Al Bait Mall located in Abraj Al Bait Towers in Mecca, the 2nd largest building in the world •  HyperMedia was the exclusive media and advertising sales partner for The Dubai Mall from 2008 to 2013, and helped develop and operate the most successful mall advertising platforms in the world •  Recently Partnered with 17 of the best malls in the UAE to create the largest mall network, including Iconic Malls such as Majid Al Futtaim Malls (eg. Mall of the Emirates), The Galleria at Al Maryah Island, Deerfieds Townsquare, Abu Dhabi Mall, Al Ghurair Centre, Wafi Mall and many others.
